title: Velvety Spicy Greek Tomato Stew
description: A comforting, velvety tomato stew with a spicy kick, made from tinned tomatoes and aromatic herbs, finished with a swirl of Greek yogurt.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large pot over medium heat.
Add the diced onion and sauté for 3-4 minutes until translucent.
Stir in the minced garlic and cook for 30 seconds, being careful not to burn.
Add the diced carrot and celery, cooking for another 5 minutes until they start to soften.
Sprinkle in the smoked paprika, red pepper flakes, cumin, coriander, oregano, and bay leaf; stir for 1 minute to release the aromas.
Pour in the canned tomatoes with their juices, tomato paste, and vegetable broth; break up the tomatoes with a spoon.
Add the sugar, lemon juice, salt, and pepper; bring the mixture to a gentle boil.
Reduce the heat to low, cover, and let it simmer for 25-30 minutes until the vegetables are tender and the flavors meld.
Remove the bay leaf. Using a hand blender or regular blender, blend the stew until smooth or leave it slightly chunky for texture.
Stir in the Greek yogurt until fully incorporated, then serve hot garnished with chopped parsley.
